ew_context: Inverse H&S completion suggests major trend reversal - potential start of new impulsive wave sequence from deeply oversold conditions
pattern_desc: Classic inverse head and shoulders with head at 0.0966 and neckline at 0.0995. Right shoulder formation complete with breakout above neckline resistance.
key_levels: Support: 0.0995 (neckline now support), 0.0980 (stop). Resistance: 0.1024 (pattern target), 0.1031 (prior high)
invalidation: Close below 0.0980 on H4 timeframe breaks the right shoulder low and negates the reversal pattern
market_context: DOGE showing technical strength despite muted crypto sentiment, with inverse H&S suggesting potential outperformance from oversold levels
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Well-formed inverse head and shoulders pattern has completed with head at 0.0966 and neckline resistance at 0.0995. The current entry at 0.0993 represents optimal positioning just below the neckline breakout level. Right shoulder formation shows clean rejection from the head low, confirming pattern validity. EMA alignment (EMA20: 0.0993 < EMA50: 0.0997) shows minimal bearish bias.

RSI at 40.7% indicates oversold conditions with reversal potential, while ATR of 0.0006 shows low volatility that may expand on pattern completion. Laminar flow with momentum alignment supports the bullish reversal thesis from this major bottom formation.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 0.1024 (pattern target and measured move), 0.1031 (prior swing high)
- **Support**: 0.0995 (neckline now support), 0.0980 (right shoulder low and stop loss)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 0.0980 on H4 timeframe would break below the right shoulder low and negate the inverse head and shoulders reversal pattern.

## Macro & Flow Context

DOGE's technical pattern suggests potential independent strength despite broader crypto market consolidation. CFD momentum alignment with laminar flow conditions supports the major reversal pattern completion.
